no: Rebalanced Poison Weapon ability this adds a second no save dot, instead of default no save straight damage.... meh? Conflicts with Nostalgia Pack's Undo EE Changes, Artisan's Kitpack's Ninja and Assassin & Blackguard overhauls, and ToF's Feats and HLAs.
sum: Rebalances the Poison Weapon ability for Blackguards and Assassins by scaling damage based on character level, making it viable throughout the entire game.

co.no: Rebalances the Poison Weapon ability for better scaling and usefulness.
